title: 100 Plastic Shot Glasses - Multi Use Crystal Clear Hard Plastic Sampling Cups - 30ml - 1 oz
features: OUR BRAND - At Catereserve we always strive to provide you with the higest quality catering product for the most affordable prices
Great Quality Design - Lightweight Sturdy Multi-use design allows for easy product separation, Rolled rim for easy sipping

PRODUCT FEATURES - Elegant Hard Crystal-clear construction expertly showcases colorful shots, and mixed drinks,Made of durable recyclable polystyrene makes our shot cups convenient, cost-efficient alternative to traditional glass beverageware

Many Different Uses - These little shot glasses  makes for perfect drinkware outside! Great for patio, poolside, picnic, great for shots top shelf liqueurs served on-the-rocks. These cups are also great as Tiny punch cups at your reception drink stations.
Pack Contents - Each Pack Contains 100 1oz-30ml Plastic shot Cups
description: OUR BRAND At Catereserve we always strive to provide you with the higest quality catering product for the most affordable prices —PRODUCT FEATURES— Elegant Hard Crystal-clear construction expertly showcases colorful sodas, teas, and mixed drinks Rolled rim for easy sipping Made of durable recyclable polystyrene Convenient, cost-efficient alternative to traditional glass beverageware Lightweight design allows for easy product separation Instantly upgrades the beverage service at any wedding reception, banquet, and other catered event Disposable for quick clean up Perfect for soda, water, punch, juice, milk, mixed drinks, jelly shots,and more Our Caterserve plastic shot cups are easy to hold and perfect for any drink you can think of! Fill em’ to the brim and you’ve got 1 fluid ounce 30 ml of desired drink inside. Great for shots top shelf liqueurs served on-the-rocks. These cups are also great as Tiny punch cups at your reception drink stations. These little shot glasses makes for perfect drinkware outside! Great for patio, poolside, picnic, and other outdoor uses. —Pack Contents — Each Pack Contains 100 1oz-30ml Plastic shot Cups
